title: Stytch API credentials should not be disclosed
description: Stytch is a passwordless authentication platform. Stytch credentials include project ID and secret. The secret key authenticates all backend API requests for user management, session control, and authentication operations.
recommendation: Remove Stytch credentials from source code. Store project ID and secret in environment variables. Rotate at stytch.com/dashboard.
impact: Full access to user authentication data, ability to create/revoke sessions, and user management operations.

checks.message: Stytch project secret detected (secret-test/live- prefix). Stytch project secrets authenticate backend API requests for passwordless authentication management including user creation and deletion, session management and revocation, magic link and OTP operations, and user authentication data access. Exposing this secret allows complete control over your authentication system. Rotate immediately at stytch.com/dashboard.
Stytch secret detected in variable assignment. Stytch manages passwordless authentication. Rotate immediately at stytch.com/dashboard.
